blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,997 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 43 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: dry, highs of 37°F, gusts to 43 mph.
Tomorrow: 2.8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 30".
